name: travelm8
description: AI-Powered Smart Travel Planner - A modern serverless travel planning platform

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend && npm run install:infrastructure
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:infrastructure
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend && npm run test:infrastructure
scripts.test:watch: npm run test:frontend:watch & npm run test:backend:watch & npm run test:infrastructure:watch
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:infrastructure
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix:backend && npm run lint:fix:infrastructure
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:infrastructure
scripts.clean:backend: cd backend && rm -rf dist coverage node_modules/.cache
scripts.clean:infrastructure: cd infrastructure && rm -rf cdk.out dist coverage node_modules/.cache
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:infrastructure
scripts.deploy:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && aws s3 sync build/ s3://your-bucket-name
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:frontend && npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:infrastructure

author: TravelM8 Team
